flashcards.back: A situation where system behavior depends on the timing of thread execution, leading to inconsistent results.
A state where two or more threads are blocked forever, waiting for each other to release resources.
A thread perpetually denied necessary resources due to flawed scheduling or locking policies.
Mechanisms (e.g., mutexes, semaphores) that coordinate thread access to shared resources.
A higher-priority thread is delayed by a lower-priority thread holding a critical resource, disrupting system priorities.
